name: Warm Terminal
tagline: Warm cream editorial meets dark terminal precision; Geist + Petrona, purple accent, mono code blocks.

palette.description: warm cream/beige base with near-black text, purple accent, and dark terminal cards; light and dark slide modes

typography.style: modern geometric sans-serif for UI, Petrona serif for quotes, Geist Mono for terminal code blocks

best_for: Anything that should bridge human warmth and technical precision: SaaS pitches, developer tool launches, API documentation, design system presentations. The cream base with dark terminal cards creates a "warm tools" aesthetic — inviting but serious.
avoid_for: Contexts that need pure corporate polish or pure playful energy — the mixed light/dark palette and terminal blocks commit to a warm-technical voice that sits between editorial and developer-tool aesthetics.
navigation: inline IntersectionObserver + keyboard handler with fixed nav dots
